headlines.headline: Plevyl Advisors sees mixed results in automated logistics pilot program

sentiment.reasoning: The mixed results of the pilot program create ambiguity regarding the effectiveness and future scalability of the logistics technology.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
